; CHECK-LABEL: @sub_to_and_nuw(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = and i10 [[X:%.*]], 120
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = add nuw nsw i10 [[TMP1]], 379
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i10 [[R]]
  %sub = sub nuw i10 71, %x
  %and = and i10 %sub, 120
  %r = sub i10 443, %and
  ret i10 %r
}
